fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer number of the customer to which the standard sales code is assigned.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a standard sales code from the Standard Sales Code table.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the standard sales code.

fields.name: Valid From Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first day when the Create Recurring Sales Inv. batch job can be used to create sales invoices.

fields.name: Valid To date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last day when the Create Recurring Sales Inv. batch job can be used to create sales invoices.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how to make payment, such as with bank transfer, cash, or check.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula that calculates the payment due date, payment discount date, and payment discount amount.

fields.name: Direct Debit Mandate ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the direct-debit mandate that this standard customer sales code uses to create sales invoices for direct debit collection.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Insert Rec. Lines On Quotes
fields.tooltip: Specifies how you want to use standard sales codes on sales quotes.

fields.name: Insert Rec. Lines On Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies how you want to use standard sales codes on sales orders.

fields.name: Insert Rec. Lines On Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies how you want to use standard sales codes on sales invoices.

fields.name: Insert Rec. Lines On Cr. Memos
fields.tooltip: Specifies how you want to use standard sales codes on sales credit memos.
